# Kokoro-82M parity manifest (M2-07). Generated by
# tools/parity/dump_kokoro_reference.py. `key = value`;
# list values are space-separated.
# mode = placeholder: the Rust parity harness runs shape /
# length checks only (byte-level parity is a follow-up).
# mode = full: at least one module has a real NumPy re-forward.
# Per-module gates (`<module>_mode`) select byte-parity per module.
model = hexgrad/Kokoro-82M
checkpoint_file = kokoro-v1_0.pth
seed = 1234
atol = 0.01
mode = full
text_encoder_mode = full
bert_mode = full
prosody_mode = full
decoder_mode = full

hidden_dim = 512
style_dim = 128
voice_id = 0

enc_pos = 8
dec_frames = 64
prosody_channels = 2
